creator: decke@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 253731
update to 2.3.0p16

Update it to the latest version.

Some people at EuroBSDCon were asking to update it because it seems some tools actively refuse to talk to check_mk_agent versions which are "too old". So I had a look at it and it seems the update is quite straight forward.

Unfortunately I am not using check_mk myself so I cannot properly do any runtime testing with it (except starting it which seems to be fine).
